name: 蒋晟

appearance.distinguishing_features: 面对女主时局促害羞的神态

visual_reference: A sturdy young ancient Chinese martial artist, honest and slightly shy face, wearing dark green practical clothes, cinematic lighting.
personality: 老实本分，体贴入微，但防备心差
arc: 从爱慕女主到被陆姝仪算计无奈接盘

relationships.dynamic: 小心翼翼地讨好与保护
relationships.function: 刺激沈词嫉妒心的工具人
